promoted golden case.meaning: Human-reviewed case admitted to regression coverage.

runtime telemetry fixture sample.meaning: Deterministic executor-adapter fixture-derived bounded facts; not live runtime telemetry.

structural fixture.meaning: Local deterministic structure sample passed; not evidence of live task success.
